body: Dr. Meera, our latest research digest reveals a 50% drop in clients. To combat this, we recommend our active offer, Teeth Whitening, priced at ₹1999. This service has shown a significant increase in client satisfaction. Will you prioritize Teeth Whitening to boost your practice?
rationale: Addressing the drop in clients with a specific solution, Teeth Whitening, and emphasizing its benefits to encourage the merchant's action.
